title: Senior Associate / Associate – Risk Assurance
metaDescription: Senior Associate / Associate – Risk Assurance role in Vietnam: plan and execute internal audit and risk assurance engagements, including ESG assurance.
description: Join our Risk Assurance team to work with top clients and gain expertise in audits, sustainability, and risk management.
duties: Plan and execute internal audit and risk assurance engagements.
Evaluate internal controls, governance, and risk management processes.
Support sustainability and ESG assurance assignments.
Prepare clear audit findings, reports, and recommendations.
Build strong working relationships with clients and stakeholders.
requirements: Degree in Accountancy, Finance, or a related field.
2 – 4 years of internal audit, external audit, or risk assurance experience.
Knowledge of risk, controls, and audit methodologies.
remuneration: Remuneration will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.
